quests.title: The Gauntlight Burns
quests.description: The Gauntlight lighthouse outside Otari has begun glowing again for the first time in decades. Wrin Sivinxi is disturbed by her visions. Something is waking beneath it.

objectives.text: Discover what is causing the light

quests.title: Descent into the Abomination Vaults
quests.description: The megadungeon beneath the Gauntlight is vast, layered, and dangerous. Each level deeper brings more powerful threats — and more answers about what Belcorra Haruvex was doing here centuries ago.

objectives.text: Clear the first level of the Vaults

quests.title: Stop the Resurrection of Belcorra Haruvex
quests.description: Belcorra Haruvex died centuries ago but her soul never left. She has been slowly gathering power in the deepest levels of the Vaults. If she fully returns, Otari and the surrounding region will pay the price.

objectives.text: Learn the nature of Belcorra's binding
Find a way to permanently end her

quests.title: The Drow of Yldaris
quests.description: A drow faction called Yldaris has been operating in the mid-levels of the Vaults. They came seeking Belcorra's secrets. Now they're trapped. Their leader Quara Orshendiel may be an enemy, a tool, or something more complicated.

objectives.text: Make contact with the Yldaris drow
